working_on: Routine task P5-10: Service nodes seed (formal-logic primitives, math prerequisites, history terminators) — fourteenth routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; depends_on [P5-01a] satisfied since S-0050. P5-10 is the single-task service-node tier per phase_5.md T1-B (the cross-subject foundational concepts that several philosophy subdomains require but that no single subject owns canonically); range per phase_5.md T2-A is 0050-0059. Author 0050_seed_services_part1.sql in the 0050-0059 sub-range; ROUTING.md per-session narrative entry. Apply via engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper (sixth routine-mode load-bearing exercise per ADR 0055; first was S-0066, second was S-0068, third was S-0070, fourth was S-0071, fifth was S-0073 including the wrapper's first routine-mode exit-3 SQL-error path); verify with engine/tools/check_target.py --task-id P5-10 and engine/tools/validate.py.
declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0050_seed_services_part1.sql with 25 service-node concepts at the granularity principle, all confidence_level INTERPRETED and domain[]={'service'}. Three sub-clusters: (A) formal-logic primitives — 10 nodes (truth_value, bivalence_principle, argument_logical, validity_logical, soundness_logical, inference_rule, modus_ponens, modus_tollens, formal_proof, counterexample); (B) math prerequisites — 8 nodes (set_mathematical, function_mathematical, axiom_mathematical, quantifier, probability_mathematical, conditional_probability, bayes_theorem, expected_value); (C) history terminators — 7 nodes (presocratic_naturalism, greek_atomism, aristotelian_four_causes, scholasticism, renaissance_mechanism, vienna_circle_logical_positivism, hegelian_dialectic). 28 within-service pedagogical_prerequisite edges total: formal-logic intra-cluster (11), math intra-cluster (8), history intra-cluster (5), service-to-service bridges (4 — axiom_mathematical → formal_proof; aristotelian_four_causes/renaissance_mechanism/hegelian_dialectic → vienna_circle_logical_positivism). All within-service; no cross-domain edges (P5-11's exclusive responsibility per phase_5.md T2-G #1); no historical_influence edges; no new edge predicates. Append per-session narrative entry to product/seed-graph/migrations/ROUTING.md. Apply via engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper per ADR 0055. Confidence_level composition target: 100% INTERPRETED (matches the twelve prior P5 subject-subdomain seeds; floor is 70%). PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite). Pre-apply node-existence sweep against the seeded ~355 ids confirmed zero collisions; suffix discipline (_logical, _mathematical) used for nodes whose unsuffixed names collide with seeded concepts (truth, validity, function, relation are canonical-homed in language/epistemology/metaphysics). Two-commit pattern. End state: P5-10 complete in auto_target.json; check_target.py --task-id P5-10 passes both criteria (migration_applied + validate_passes). graph_version 14→15. Sub-range slots 0051-0059 left reserved. phase: P_5
outcome_summary: Phase 5 service-node tier seed (P5-10) lands at S-0074 — fourteenth routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; the service-node tier (formal-logic primitives, math prerequisites, history terminators) is fully seeded as the foundational layer that the prior thirteen subject seedings pedagogically build on top of. **Second consecutive observable confirmation of the S-0072 parent-FF wrapper change**: the worktree was at origin/main HEAD (c54f1e4 post-S-0073 close) at session start — routine_boot_freshness.py exited silently (exit 0, no FF needed); routine_lifecycle_push.py's post-push parent-FF advanced parent main from c54f1e4 → 6cc980a (eager-claim) → 083ce58 (deliverable) → close. **Naming-collision discipline applied at id-selection time prevented the kind of in-session canonical-home conflict S-0073 hit on problem_of_induction**: suffixes (_logical, _mathematical, _principle) were applied to ids whose unsuffixed names collide with seeded canonical-home concepts (truth, validity, soundness, argument, set, function, axiom, probability all reserved for substantive uses elsewhere); pre-apply node-existence sweep against the ~355 already-seeded ids confirmed zero collisions; the apply_migration.py wrapper's first-apply path completed cleanly. 25 nodes + 28 edges across three sub-clusters per phase_5.md T1-B: (A) formal-logic primitives (10) — truth_value, bivalence_principle, argument_logical, validity_logical, soundness_logical, inference_rule, modus_ponens, modus_tollens, formal_proof, counterexample (sub-philosophical foundations of reasoning that the philosophical-logic concepts in P5-03 build on); (B) math prerequisites (8) — set_mathematical, function_mathematical, axiom_mathematical, quantifier, probability_mathematical, conditional_probability, bayes_theorem, expected_value (Kolmogorov 1933 axiomatization grounding bayesian_epistemology in P5-01b, bayesianism_confirmation in P5-09, formal decision theory across ethics and political philosophy); (C) history terminators (7) — presocratic_naturalism, greek_atomism (Democritus/Epicurus), aristotelian_four_causes (material/formal/efficient/final), scholasticism (medieval Aristotelianism), renaissance_mechanism (Galileo/Descartes/Hobbes/Boyle), vienna_circle_logical_positivism (Schlick/Carnap 1920s-1930s), hegelian_dialectic (the central methodological alternative the analytic tradition defined itself against). 5-tier layered DAG with three cluster roots (T0 truth_value, set_mathematical, presocratic_naturalism) plus the multi-bridge sink vienna_circle_logical_positivism (T4 — receives in-edges from aristotelian_four_causes T1, renaissance_mechanism T3, hegelian_dialectic T4-by-pedagogy). Four cross-cluster service-to-service bridges (axiom_mathematical → formal_proof tying math to formal-logic; aristotelian_four_causes / renaissance_mechanism / hegelian_dialectic → vienna_circle_logical_positivism tying the historical chain to the founding of analytic philosophy). 25/25 INTERPRETED; 0% EXTRACTED; 0% SYNTHETIC; within-service edges only. graph_version 14→15. **Sixth load-bearing routine-mode exercise of engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper per ADR 0055** (first S-0066 P5-07a; second S-0068 P5-06; third S-0070 P5-07b; fourth S-0071 P5-08; fifth S-0073 P5-09 — including the durably-confirmed first-routine-exercise of the wrapper's exit-3 SQL-error rollback path) — first apply attempt succeeded cleanly with no UNIQUE-violation; recorded in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations as version 20260505225759. The wrapper's first-apply-success path is now durably confirmed across six routine fires. check_target.py --task-id P5-10 PASS both criteria (migration_applied PASS; validate_passes PASS, exit 1 = soft-warns only). validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 370 soft-warns (363 missing_rigor_score continuing the partial-seed pattern per phase_5.md T2-C with running total +21 from S-0073's 342 — close to the +25 expected from the newly seeded service nodes; 7 issue_collision unchanged from S-0073). Two-commit pattern continued (eager-claim 6cc980a + deliverable 083ce58 + this close). 0 in-band Issues filed; 0 HANDOFF entries. The naming-collision discipline applied at id-selection time prevented the in-session canonical-home conflict S-0073 hit — a process improvement worth noting (the suffix discipline was the right reading of phase_5.md T2-G #2 forward-pointer; S-0073 retroactively confirmed it after hitting the conflict, S-0074 applied it preemptively). Sub-range slots 0051-0059 left reserved (granularity principle achieved within 0050; reserved for future Phase 6+ extension if telemetry warrants additional service-node primitives — measure-theory primitives if probability nodes need deeper grounding; basic linear algebra if specific philosophy-of-physics specialization arrives; additional history terminators like Stoicism, Kantian transcendental method, Husserlian phenomenology-as-method, ordinary-language philosophy-as-methodology, post-1960s analytic-philosophy schools). All three lifecycle pushes succeeded via routine_lifecycle_push.py (eager-claim, deliverable, close — wrapper's T1-A long-confirmed since S-0061; apply_migration's T1-A now confirmed across six routine fires S-0066/S-0068/S-0070/S-0071/S-0073/S-0074). Forward state: P5-10 complete; the service-node tier is fully seeded; **P5-11 (Cross-bridges) is now eligible for the first time** — every dependency satisfied (all 9 subject subdomains a-and-b parts where split + P5-10 service nodes); the next routine fire's eligibility walk picks P5-11 in walk order. Phase 5 progress: 14/16 tasks complete; 14 routine sessions consumed of 18 max_sessions per phase_5.md T1-C — 2 sub-tasks remaining (P5-11 cross-bridges, P5-12 closeout) — 4-session buffer comfortable.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope was 25 nodes / 28 edges across the three service-node sub-clusters; delivered exactly 25 nodes and 28 edges as planned — no in-session deltas. Three sub-clusters as planned: (A) formal-logic primitives (10) — truth_value, bivalence_principle, argument_logical, validity_logical, soundness_logical, inference_rule, modus_ponens, modus_tollens, formal_proof, counterexample; (B) math prerequisites (8) — set_mathematical, function_mathematical, axiom_mathematical, quantifier, probability_mathematical, conditional_probability, bayes_theorem, expected_value; (C) history terminators (7) — presocratic_naturalism, greek_atomism, aristotelian_four_causes, scholasticism, renaissance_mechanism, vienna_circle_logical_positivism, hegelian_dialectic. Edge structure as planned: formal-logic intra-cluster (11), math intra-cluster (8), history intra-cluster (5), service-to-service bridges (4 — axiom_mathematical → formal_proof; aristotelian_four_causes / renaissance_mechanism / hegelian_dialectic → vienna_circle_logical_positivism). 5-tier layered DAG; every edge points strictly down-tier; no cycles; no duplicate (source_id, target_id, edge_type) triples; validate.py's Kosaraju SCC check confirms post-apply. PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite used; already in registry); ROUTING.md per-session narrative appended at the chronological tail. Migration applied to paideia-dev via the apply_migration.py wrapper on the first attempt (no canonical-home conflicts thanks to the suffix discipline applied at id-selection time per phase_5.md T2-G #2 forward-pointer); recorded in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations as version 20260505225759. graph_version 14→15 honored. confidence_level distribution 25/25 INTERPRETED matches phase_5.md T2-B 70% floor with margin. Pre-apply Python regex+DFS integrity check (25 nodes parsed, 28 edges parsed, all endpoints in node set, no duplicates, no cycles) clean. check_target.py --task-id P5-10 passes both criteria. validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 370 soft-warns. Two-commit pattern continued (eager-claim 6cc980a + deliverable 083ce58 + close). Sub-range slots 0051-0059 left reserved. **Sixth load-bearing routine-mode exercise of apply_migration.py wrapper succeeded cleanly on the first apply attempt**: continues to confirm the subprocess-bypass pattern from ADR 0055 works repeatably in routine context across six independent fires. **Second consecutive observable confirmation of the S-0072 routine close-out apparatus** (parent FF post-push and post-close worktree sweep): no boot freshness intervention required at session start (worktree was at origin/main HEAD post-S-0073), and the parent-FF chain through the three lifecycle pushes worked cleanly.

commits.summary: seed service-node tier — formal-logic primitives, math prerequisites, history terminators (P5-10)
